2026-04-25T14:57:58.5213001Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-25T14:57:58.5213523Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-25T14:57:58.5213926Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-25T14:57:58.5214277Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-25T14:57:58.5214588Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-25T14:57:58.5214813Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-25T14:57:58.5214968Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-25T14:57:58.5215143Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-25T14:57:58.5215306Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-25T14:57:58.5215526Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-25T14:57:58.5215987Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-25T14:57:58.5216240Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-25T14:59:01.8154593Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-25T14:58:48.977680059Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58680,\"title\":\"[Mgmt Generator] KeyNotFoundException in OperationSourceDict for Page LRO body types blocks AppService migration\",\"body\":\"## Bug Description\\n\\nWhen a TypeSpec mgmt operation is an LRO that returns a `Page`-shape model (e.g. `model WebAppCollection is Azure.Core.Page`) as its body type, the generator throws an unhandled `KeyNotFoundException` and aborts the entire library generation.\\n\\n## Repro\\n\\nTriggered while generating `Azure.ResourceManager.AppService` from `specification/web/resource-manager/Microsoft.Web/AppService` on `azure-rest-api-specs/main`.\\n\\nOperations that hit this pattern (all use `WebAppCollection` / `DeletedWebAppCollection` which are `Azure.Core.Page` / `Page` envelopes):\\n- `AppServiceEnvironmentResource.tsp` — `changeVnet`, plus several others around lines 157, 298, 330, 350\\n- `AppServicePlan.tsp:243`\\n- `Site.tsp:178`, `1490`, `1574`\\n\\nSpec snippet (one example):\\n```typespec\\nmodel WebAppCollection is Azure.Core.Page;\\n\\n@action(\\u0026#34;changeVirtualNetwork\\u0026#34;)\\n@list\\nchangeVnet is Azure.ResourceManager.ArmResourceActionAsyncBase\\u0026lt;\\n  AppServiceEnvironmentResource,\\n  VirtualNetworkProfile,\\n  ArmResponse | (ArmAcceptedLroResponse\\u0026gt; \\u0026amp; {\\n    @bodyRoot _: WebAppCollection;\\n  }),\\n  BaseParameters = Azure.ResourceManager.Foundations.DefaultBaseParameters,\\n  Error = DefaultErrorResponse\\n\\u0026gt;;\\n```\\n\\n## Error\\n\\n```\\nerror @typespec/http-client-csharp/general-error: Failed to generate the library. Exit code: 1.\\nThe given key \\u0026#39;global::Azure.ResourceManager.AppService.Models.WebAppCollection\\u0026#39; was not present in the dictionary.\\n   at System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary`2.get_Item(TKey key)\\n   at Azure.Generator.Management.Providers.OperationMethodProviders.ResourceOperationMethodProvider.BuildLroHandling(...) ResourceOperationMethodProvider.cs:line 462\\n   at ResourceOperationMethodProvider.BuildTryExpression() line 268\\n   at ResourceOperationMethodProvider.BuildBodyStatements() line 214\\n   at ResourceOperationMethodProvider..ctor(...) line 113\\n   at ResourceClientProvider.BuildResourceOperationMethod(...) line 454\\n   at ResourceClientProvider.BuildMethods() line 398\\n   at ManagementOutputLibrary.ExtractArrayResponseCollectionResults() line 348\\n   at ManagementOutputLibrary.BuildTypeProviders() line 322\\n```\\n\\n## Root Cause (likely)\\n\\n`ResourceOperationMethodProvider.BuildLroHandling` line 462:\\n\\n```csharp\\nelse if (_originalBodyType != null)\\n{\\n    // Non-resource type - use parameterless constructor\\n    var operationSourceType = ManagementClientGenerator.Instance.OutputLibrary.OperationSourceDict[_originalBodyType].Type;\\n    operationSourceInstance = New.Instance(operationSourceType);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n`OperationSourceDict` is not populated for `Page`-shape envelope models, so any LRO whose body type is a `Page` envelope dies with KNFE.\\n\\n## Impact\\n\\nBlocks the entire `Azure.ResourceManager.AppService` TypeSpec migration. Likely affects any other mgmt service that uses `Page`-typed LRO bodies (a common pattern for `@action` operations that return paged sub-resources synchronously *or* asynchronously).\\n\\n## Asks\\n\\n1. Either populate `OperationSourceDict` for `Page` body types, or\\n2. Fall back to a parameterless OperationSource lookup that can handle paged bodies, or\\n3. Detect the `Page` shape at codegen time and emit pageable-LRO scaffolding instead of throwing.\\n\\n## Workaround\\n\\nNone currently. Spec-side `@@alternateType` to swap `WebAppCollection` to `Site[]` would change the public API across multiple operations and is not safe without service-team approval.\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58680\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"ArthurMa1978\",\"id\":20514459,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/ArthurMa1978\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/20514459?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"bug\",\"CodeGen\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-25T14:56:28Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-25T14:56:28Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
2026-04-25T14:59:01.8170113Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-25T14:58:48.987077345Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":58680,"method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-04-25T14:59:01.8189131Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-25T14:58:49.175851592Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58680,\"title\":\"[Mgmt Generator] KeyNotFoundException in OperationSourceDict for Page LRO body types blocks AppService migration\",\"body\":\"## Bug Description\\n\\nWhen a TypeSpec mgmt operation is an LRO that returns a `Page`-shape model (e.g. `model WebAppCollection is Azure.Core.Page`) as its body type, the generator throws an unhandled `KeyNotFoundException` and aborts the entire library generation.\\n\\n## Repro\\n\\nTriggered while generating `Azure.ResourceManager.AppService` from `specification/web/resource-manager/Microsoft.Web/AppService` on `azure-rest-api-specs/main`.\\n\\nOperations that hit this pattern (all use `WebAppCollection` / `DeletedWebAppCollection` which are `Azure.Core.Page` / `Page` envelopes):\\n- `AppServiceEnvironmentResource.tsp` — `changeVnet`, plus several others around lines 157, 298, 330, 350\\n- `AppServicePlan.tsp:243`\\n- `Site.tsp:178`, `1490`, `1574`\\n\\nSpec snippet (one example):\\n```typespec\\nmodel WebAppCollection is Azure.Core.Page;\\n\\n@action(\\u0026#34;changeVirtualNetwork\\u0026#34;)\\n@list\\nchangeVnet is Azure.ResourceManager.ArmResourceActionAsyncBase\\u0026lt;\\n  AppServiceEnvironmentResource,\\n  VirtualNetworkProfile,\\n  ArmResponse | (ArmAcceptedLroResponse\\u0026gt; \\u0026amp; {\\n    @bodyRoot _: WebAppCollection;\\n  }),\\n  BaseParameters = Azure.ResourceManager.Foundations.DefaultBaseParameters,\\n  Error = DefaultErrorResponse\\n\\u0026gt;;\\n```\\n\\n## Error\\n\\n```\\nerror @typespec/http-client-csharp/general-error: Failed to generate the library. Exit code: 1.\\nThe given key \\u0026#39;global::Azure.ResourceManager.AppService.Models.WebAppCollection\\u0026#39; was not present in the dictionary.\\n   at System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary`2.get_Item(TKey key)\\n   at Azure.Generator.Management.Providers.OperationMethodProviders.ResourceOperationMethodProvider.BuildLroHandling(...) ResourceOperationMethodProvider.cs:line 462\\n   at ResourceOperationMethodProvider.BuildTryExpression() line 268\\n   at ResourceOperationMethodProvider.BuildBodyStatements() line 214\\n   at ResourceOperationMethodProvider..ctor(...) line 113\\n   at ResourceClientProvider.BuildResourceOperationMethod(...) line 454\\n   at ResourceClientProvider.BuildMethods() line 398\\n   at ManagementOutputLibrary.ExtractArrayResponseCollectionResults() line 348\\n   at ManagementOutputLibrary.BuildTypeProviders() line 322\\n```\\n\\n## Root Cause (likely)\\n\\n`ResourceOperationMethodProvider.BuildLroHandling` line 462:\\n\\n```csharp\\nelse if (_originalBodyType != null)\\n{\\n    // Non-resource type - use parameterless constructor\\n    var operationSourceType = ManagementClientGenerator.Instance.OutputLibrary.OperationSourceDict[_originalBodyType].Type;\\n    operationSourceInstance = New.Instance(operationSourceType);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n`OperationSourceDict` is not populated for `Page`-shape envelope models, so any LRO whose body type is a `Page` envelope dies with KNFE.\\n\\n## Impact\\n\\nBlocks the entire `Azure.ResourceManager.AppService` TypeSpec migration. Likely affects any other mgmt service that uses `Page`-typed LRO bodies (a common pattern for `@action` operations that return paged sub-resources synchronously *or* asynchronously).\\n\\n## Asks\\n\\n1. Either populate `OperationSourceDict` for `Page` body types, or\\n2. Fall back to a parameterless OperationSource lookup that can handle paged bodies, or\\n3. Detect the `Page` shape at codegen time and emit pageable-LRO scaffolding instead of throwing.\\n\\n## Workaround\\n\\nNone currently. Spec-side `@@alternateType` to swap `WebAppCollection` to `Site[]` would change the public API across multiple operations and is not safe without service-team approval.\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58680\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"ArthurMa1978\",\"id\":20514459,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/ArthurMa1978\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/20514459?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"bug\",\"CodeGen\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-25T14:56:28Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-25T14:56:28Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
